expectations.text: A regression test for the specific bug is written BEFORE any fix is applied
expectations.evidence: Agent confirmed RED phase: tests written first, strconv.Atoi parsing error confirmed before fix

expectations.text: The regression test name clearly describes the bug
expectations.evidence: Table-driven test with subtest 'fractional hours bug reproduction' — clearly describes the bug

expectations.text: The regression test is run and confirmed to FAIL before the fix
expectations.evidence: Agent confirmed: go test failed with 'strconv.Atoi: parsing 1.5: invalid syntax'

expectations.text: The fix uses strconv.ParseFloat instead of strconv.Atoi
The fix is minimal — only changes what's needed to handle fractional values
expectations.evidence: Only changed Atoi→ParseFloat and int→float64 multiplication. No other structural changes.

expectations.text: Existing behaviors are preserved (integer durations like '2h' still work)
expectations.evidence: Explicit 'integer regression' subtest: input '2h', want 2*time.Hour. Intentional regression guard.

expectations.text: Additional edge cases are tested (e.g., '0.5m', '2.25h', fractional seconds)
expectations.evidence: Table-driven test includes 4 cases: 1.5h (bug repro), 0.5m (fractional minutes), 2.25h (different fractional hours), 2h (integer regression).

expectations.text: All tests pass after the fix
